chapter_title.en: Chapter on Emancipation and Its Rulings

text: 3434 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "يُسْتَحَبُّ لِلرَّجُلِ أَنْ يَتَقَرَّبَ عَشِيَّةَ عَرَفَةَ وَ يَوْمَ عَرَفَةَ بِالْعِتْقِ وَ اَلصَّدَقَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3434 - Hammad narrated from al-Halabi, from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"It is recommended for a man to draw closer to Allah (swt) on the evening of Arafah and the Day of Arafah through freeing slaves and giving charity."
